language: JavaScript (ES5-compatible with some ES6, inside single HTML file)
build_system: None - single HTML file, no bundler
test_framework: Custom headless test runner in test-sld.js using Node.js assert module with DOM mocks
build_command: node test-sld.js (validates JS syntax via eval + runs tests)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'node test-sld.js' and confirm all tests pass (39 existing + new tests). 2. Verify no syntax errors by successful eval in the test harness.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - Node.js is pre-installed, the app is a single HTML file.
environment_constraints: Open internet. No Docker needed. Single HTML file architecture means all code goes in one file. Tests use eval() to extract <script> content.
contribution_requirements: All existing 39 tests must continue to pass. New features must include headless tests in test-sld.js. Trilingual support (da/en/fa with RTL). Click-only UI. Life-safety critical calculations must be conservative.

key_patterns.translation: tx(danish, english) function with _FA dict for Farsi lookup. tp(obj) for {da,en,fa} objects.
key_patterns.module_rendering: renderModule(mod) switch statement routes to renderXxx() functions returning HTML strings
key_patterns.state_management: Global vars (sldTree, sldSelectedId, etc.) with sldSave()/sldLoad() for localStorage
key_patterns.SLD_architecture: Tree data model with nodes (transformer, main_board, sub_board, final_circuit). sldPropagateAll() does two-pass computation. sldRenderCanvas() generates SVG.
key_patterns.selectivity: sldAnalyzeSelectivity(tree, childNodeId) returns {verdict, limitCurrent, details, clause}. sldDeviceCurve(device, In, settings) returns [{i, tMin, tMax}] points.
key_patterns.3D_style: build3D() uses dark background (linear-gradient #050c18 to #010408), neon glow (feGaussianBlur filter), isometric 3D boxes with polygon faces, color per node type
key_patterns.products: PRODUCTS object with .cables[], .mcbs[], .mccbs[], .fuses[] arrays. MCB_CURVES constant.
key_patterns.calculation: sldCalcNodeIk(tree, nodeId) returns {ikmax, ikmin, zs, z1}. sldGetPath(tree, nodeId) returns root-to-node path.

directory_structure: Flat structure - single HTML file contains all code. test-sld.js is the headless test file. .agents/tasks/ for task state.
